cards.rules_text: Challenger, Scout [i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature. Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)[/i]
If Tail of the Dragon is recalled, you may put a card named Concussive Palm from your graveyard into your hand. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]
Lifelink, Ephemeral [i](This creature can attack and T as soon as it comes under your control. At the end of turn, or at end of combat if it attacked or blocked, sacrifice it.)[/i]

Skulk, Attune: {C} [i](This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. When this creature enters, add {C}. This mana can only be used used to cast instants and sorceries.)[/i]
When Zap Sprayfin enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal an instant or sorcery with mana value 3 or less, add it to your hand and shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

When Yordle Grifter enters, reveal the card on top of your library, if the revealed card has the same colour identity as Yordle Grifter, then exile the card from the bottom of target opponents library. You may cast the card exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast that copy. Then put a charge counter on Yordle Grifter.
{T}: Remove a charge counter from Yordle Grifter. Yordle Grifter deals 1 damage to any target.

Target creature gets Vulnerable until end of turn. If the target creature is destroyed this turn, draw a card. [i](When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature of your choice that you control, even if that creature cannot normally block.)[/i]

Fearsome, Deep [i](Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less. The first time your library has one third of the total starting cards left, you are Deep for the rest of the game. If you are Deep, all creatures with Deep you control get +3/+3.)[/i]

First strike
Whenever Twisted Fate enters, choose one —
• Add {C} and draw a card.
• Twisted Fate deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control.
• Twisted Fate deals 2 damage to the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls, then put a stun counter on it.
Whenever you draw a card, put a Swindler counter on Twisted Fate. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Twisted Fate has nine or more Swindler counters, remove all Swindler counters from Twisted Fate and transform him.
Partner
cards.rules_text2:
First strike
The first time you cast a spell each turn add {C} and draw a card. The second time you cast a spell each turn, Twisted Fate deals 1 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. The third time you cast a spell each turn, Twisted Fate deals 2 damage to the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls, then put a stun counter on it.

[i](Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they are not normally able to block this creature.)[/i]

If the blocking creature is not destroyed, it is Recalled. [i](A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)[/i]
